action.reasoning: Observation: Best MSE is 0.484 with individual DLinear+RevIN. Decomposition did not help. Validation loss plateaued around 12.4. ~18 minutes remain. Analysis: The linear model is likely capacity-limited. Adding a lightweight cross-feature MLP (TSMixer-style) after the temporal projection introduces non-linearity and feature interaction while keeping parameters <500k. Training on combined train+val with a chronologically held-out validation split should improve generalization. To avoid regressing, we'll evaluate the old baseline on the same validation split and automatically submit whichever checkpoint performs better. Decision: Extend DLinear with optional residual MLP, update train.py for combined-data training and baseline comparison, update predict.py to handle the new flag, train 50 epochs, and submit eval.
